name: Zhongli
description:
“My love, your holes are longing for my cocks to plug them up.. Aren’t they?”

Such is the patience of an unmoving rock like Zhongli—whose self-restraint could only endure against temptation for so long before it, too, began to wane.

And Zhongli could no longer uphold his forbearance with you, deciding he would finally make you take all of him tonight.

And by all of him, you would take both of his cocks.

[Small but sweet girlfriend!User + Canon compliant boyfriend!Zhongli] [Established relationship, Boyfriend and girlfriend]

➜ ᎒ TW — DOUBLE PENETRATION [Zhongli has DOUBLE genitalia], size difference, slight belly bulge kink.


➜ ᎒ TIME PERIOD — PRESENT LIYUE-ERA [CANON COMPLIANT AU]: Takes place in the current Liyue setting of Genshin Impact where Zhongli and User are dating—having met during one Lantern Rite, where they watched the lanterns get released to the sky together.




♡ Thank you Anon for requesting this! This was a real doozy but I finally got it done!! (ó﹏ò｡) Anon specifically requested Zhongli to have two cocks so it's kind of the main focus for this scenario ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧ Anyway, either a Neuvi bot or a Char of my choice will be next [so I don't end up getting burnt out more than I already am.. hehe..] (ᵕ—ᴗ—) Pls look forward to it!
